---
title: "Generated API Reference"
description: "Entry point for Doxygen documentation generated from the matching OPALX source revision."
audience: developer
status: current
last-reviewed: "2026-07-22"
---

The documentation build generates Doxygen directly from
`opalx/src` and publishes it inside the same build artifact as this Quarto
manual.

[Open the generated OPALX API](../api/html/index.html)

The API directory is absent in a plain Quarto preview until
`scripts/build_doxygen.sh` is run. CI checks out the current OPALX source,
renders the manual, generates Doxygen, and uploads both together. Generated
HTML is never committed to this repository.
